title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout is hiring a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its go-to-market engine, reporting to the CRO. The role requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, with proven experience scaling revenue operations beyond $30M+ ARR. Deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise is needed, plus cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Experience working with globally distributed teams across time zones, including the Tel Aviv HQ, is essential.
score_reason: Exceptional match - Head of Revenue Operations role at a fintech SaaS company with 15+ years of B2B SaaS experience exceeds the 7+ year requirement, deep Salesforce expertise aligns perfectly, and Tel Aviv hybrid location matches candidate's preferred geography. Only minor gap is no specific mention of $30M+ ARR scaling in profile, but seniority level suggests this experience.
ai_opener: Hi [Hiring Manager], I noticed Finout is building out its Revenue Operations function from the CRO level—this caught my attention given my 15+ years scaling GTM operations in B2B SaaS, including deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics work that's directly powered growth beyond $30M ARR checkpoints. I've led cross-functional revenue ops teams across distributed geographies and would be interested in exploring how I could help establish Finout's operational backbone as you scale.

title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Render, a modern cloud platform for developers building AI-native, full-stack applications, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations. The role calls for 8-12 years in Revenue Operations, Sales Strategy, or GTM Operations, ideally at a B2B SaaS company with a PLG motion layered with enterprise sales. The ideal candidate has proven experience building RevOps infrastructure from the ground up. This is a strategic leadership position helping scale the company's go-to-market operations.
score_reason: Exceptional match: 15+ years exceeds the 8-12 year requirement, AI-native GTM aligns perfectly with Render's developer platform focus, and proven RevOps infrastructure building experience directly addresses their scaling needs. Remote location is ideal.

With 15+ years building RevOps from the ground up in B2B SaaS, including deep experience architecting GTM operations for AI-forward companies, I'd be well-positioned to help scale your combined PLG+enterprise motion. The challenge of operationalizing growth for developer platforms in the AI era is exactly where I've focused my recent work.

title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Cyngn is hiring a Head of Revenue Operations requiring 8+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, or a similar GTM analytics role in B2B SaaS or enterprise software. The role demands strong analytical rigor in data analytics, forecasting, funnel modeling, and KPIs with CRM and BI tools. Responsibilities include building systems that accelerate pipeline velocity, improving forecast precision, translating business goals into scalable processes, and collaborating cross-functionally with sales, marketing, finance, and product. Experience in Robotics, IoT, or high-tech B2B environments is a plus.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps/GTM with deep expertise in pipeline forecasting, Salesforce, and cross-functional analytics is a perfect match for this Head of RevOps role. The remote position aligns with his location flexibility, and while robotics/IoT isn't his background, his enterprise B2B SaaS credentials exceed the 8+ year requirement significantly.
ai_opener: I've been building revenue operations systems for enterprise B2B SaaS companies for 15+ years, and Cyngn's focus on accelerating pipeline velocity through forecasting rigor and scalable processes is exactly the kind of impact-driven work I've specialized in. With my background translating complex business goals into data-driven GTM frameworks using Salesforce and BI tools, I'd be excited to explore how I could help Cyngn systematize its growth infrastructure as it scales.

title: RevOps Manager
description: Instrumentl, a YC-backed grant fundraising SaaS startup serving 5,000+ nonprofits, seeks a RevOps Manager to own the technical infrastructure powering the revenue engine. I'd be interested in exploring how my experience scaling RevOps from early-stage through product-led growth could help you build the operational foundation for the next phase of Instrumentl.
